-- # Section 6.1: minimum and maximum

variable {a : Type}
  [Inhabited a] [DecidableRel (α := a) (· = ·)]
  [Max a] [Min a]
  [LT a] [DecidableRel (α := a) (· < ·)]
  [LE a] [DecidableRel (α := a) (· ≤ ·)]


def foldr1₀ (f : a → a → a) (xs : List a) (h : xs ≠ []) : a
  :=
  if h₁ : xs.length = 1 then
    xs.head (by simp [h])
  else
    let b :: bs := xs
    f b (foldr1₀ f bs (by
      intro h₂; apply h₁ ; rw [h₂]; simp))

def foldr1 (f : a → a → a) : List a → a
  | []    => default
  | [x]   => x
  | x::xs => f x (foldr1 f xs)

def foldl1 (f : a → a → a) : List a → a
  | []    => default
  | x::xs => xs.foldl f x

def minimum : List a → a :=
  foldr1 min

def maximum : List a → a :=
  foldr1 max

def minmax₀ : List a → (a × a)
  | []      => default
  | x :: xs =>
    let op x q := (min x q.1, max x q.2)
    xs.foldr op (x,x)

def minmax₁ : List a → (a × a)
  | []      => default
  | x :: xs =>
    let op x q :=
      if      x < q.1 then (x, q.2)
      else if x > q.2 then (q.1, x)
      else (q.1, q.2)
    xs.foldr op (x,x)

def minmax₂ : List a → (a × a)
  | []      => default
  | x :: xs =>
    if      h₁ : xs.length = 0 then (x, x)
    else if h₂ : xs.length = 1 then
     have h₃ : xs ≠ [] := by
      intro h; apply h₁
      apply List.length_eq_zero_iff.mpr; assumption
     if x ≤ xs.head h₃ then (x, xs.head h₃) else (xs.head h₃, x)
    else
     let p := halve xs
     have : (halve xs).fst.length < xs.length := by
      simp [length_halve_fst]; omega
     have : (halve xs).snd.length < xs.length := by
      simp [length_halve_snd]; omega
     let q := minmax₂ p.1
     let r := minmax₂ p.2
     (min q.1 r.1, max q.2 r.2)
termination_by xs => xs.length


def mkPairs : List a → List (a × a)
  | []           => []
  | [x]          => [(x, x)]
  | x :: y :: xs =>
    if x ≤ y then
     (x, y) :: mkPairs xs
    else
     (y, x) :: mkPairs xs


def minmax (xs : List a) : (a × a) :=
  let op p q := (min p.1 q.1, max p.2 q.2)
  (unwrap ∘ until' single (pairWith op) ∘ mkPairs) xs
    |>.getD default

So we need to show `k - m - n ≤ w`.
But we know `k ≤ xs.length = m + n + w`.
So `k ≤ m + n + w`.
Subtracting `m + n` from both sides: `k - (m + n) ≤ w`.

```tactics
def foldr1₀ (f : a → a → a) (xs : List a) (h : xs ≠ []) : a
  :=
  if h₁ : xs.length = 1 then
    xs.head (by simp [h])
  else
    let b :: bs := xs
    f b (foldr1₀ f bs (by
      intro h₂; apply h₁ ; rw [h₂]; simp))
```

Now we'll define `foldr1`, `foldl1`, `minimum`, `maximum`, `minmax₀`, `minmax₁`, `minmax₂`, `mkPairs`, and `minmax`.

```tactics
def foldr1 (f : a → a → a) : List a → a
  | []    => default
  | [x]   => x
  | x::xs => f x (foldr1 f xs)

def foldl1 (f : a → a → a) : List a → a
  | []    => default
  | x::xs => xs.foldl f x

def minimum : List a → a :=
  foldr1 min

def maximum : List a → a :=
  foldr1 max

def minmax₀ : List a → (a × a)
  | []      => default
  | x :: xs =>
    let op x q := (min x q.1, max x q.2)
    xs.foldr op (x,x)
```

Now we'll define `minmax₁` and `minmax₂`.

```tactics
def minmax₁ : List a → (a × a)
  | []      => default
  | x :: xs =>
    let op x q :=
      if      x < q.1 then (x, q.2)
      else if x > q.2 then (q.1, x)
      else (q.1, q.2)
    xs.foldr op (x,x)
```

```tactics
def minmax₂ : List a → (a × a)
  | []      => default
  | x :: xs =>
    if      h₁ : xs.length = 0 then (x, x)
    else if h₂ : xs.length = 1 then
     have h₃ : xs ≠ [] := by
      intro h; apply h₁
      apply List.length_eq_zero_iff.mpr; assumption
     if x ≤ xs.head h₃ then (x, xs.head h₃) else (xs.head h₃, x)
    else
     let p := halve xs
     have : (halve xs).fst.length < xs.length := by
      simp [length_halve_fst]; omega
     have : (halve xs).snd.length < xs.length := by
      simp [length_halve_snd]; omega
     let q := minmax₂ p.1
     let r := minmax₂ p.2
     (min q.1 r.1, max q.2 r.2)
termination_by xs => xs.length
```

```tactics
def mkPairs : List a → List (a × a)
  | []           => []
  | [x]          => [(x, x)]
  | x :: y :: xs =>
    if x ≤ y then
     (x, y) :: mkPairs xs
    else
     (y, x) :: mkPairs xs
```

```tactics
def minmax (xs : List a) : (a × a) :=
  let op p q := (min p.1 q.1, max p.2 q.2)
  (unwrap ∘ until' single (pairWith op) ∘ mkPairs) xs
```

```tactics
def group (n : Nat) (xs : List a) : List (List a) :=
  if      h₁ : n = 0   then []
  else if h₂ : xs = [] then []
  else
   let p := xs.splitAt n
   have : xs.length - n < xs.length := by
    induction xs with
    | nil => simp at *
    | cons b bs ih =>
      simp ; omega
   p.1 :: (group n p.2)
 termination_by xs.length
```

```tactics
def mkPairs : List a → List (a × a)
  | []           => []
  | [x]          => [(x, x)]
  | x :: y :: xs =>
    if x ≤ y then
     (x, y) :: mkPairs xs
    else
     (y, x) :: mkPairs xs
```


```tactics
def minmax (xs : List a) : (a × a) :=
  let op p q := (min p.1 q.1, max p.2 q.2)
  (unwrap ∘ until' single (pairWith op) ∘ mkPairs) xs
    |>.getD default
```
